query: UPDATE providers SET name = $1, endpoint = $2, cloud_region = $3, cloud_project = $4, deployment = $5, api_version = $6, auth_mode = $7, active_credential_version_id = CASE WHEN $7 IN ('adc', 'default_chain') THEN NULL ELSE active_credential_version_id END, state = 'draft'::provider_state, etag = $8, updated_at = now(), last_probe_at = NULL, last_probe_status = NULL, last_probe_detail = NULL WHERE id = $9 AND etag = $10 AND state <> 'disabled'::provider_state
